summary: Organizer Proof Bypass Fix - All tests passed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI checks passed. The organizer's 'Rejoindre la réunion' link in AppointmentDetail.js now correctly routes through /proof/{id}?token=... instead of direct visio access. No direct visio links (zoom.us, teams.microsoft.com, meet.google.com) found anywhere in the app for video appointments.

backend: GET /api/proof/{appointment_id}/info returns is_organizer=true for organizer token
GET /api/proof/{appointment_id}/info returns meeting_host_url field for organizer
GET /api/proof/{appointment_id}/info returns is_organizer=false for participant token
GET /api/proof/{appointment_id}/info returns empty meeting_host_url for participant
Appointment info structure verified for video type
frontend: AppointmentDetail.js: No direct visio links (zoom.us, teams.microsoft.com, meet.google.com) on page
InvitationPage.js: No direct visio links on participant invitation page
CheckinPage.js: Proof page loads correctly with 'Je rejoins la réunion' button
CheckinPage.js: Shows appointment details and participant info correctly

AppointmentDetail.js.no_direct_visio_href: grep confirmed: No href=.*meeting_join_url or href=.*meeting_host_url patterns found

InvitationPage.js.no_direct_visio_href: grep confirmed: No href=.*meeting_join_url or href=.*meeting_host_url patterns found

proof_routes.py.line_161-183: /info endpoint correctly returns is_organizer flag and meeting_host_url for organizer only
proof_routes.py.line_252-258: /checkin endpoint returns host_url for organizer, join_url for participant

CheckinPage.js.line_92-96: After checkin, visio URL from backend response (meeting_join_url) is opened in new tab

context_for_next_testing_agent: Organizer proof bypass fix verified. All users (organizer + participant) must now go through NLYT Proof flow (/proof/{id}?token=...) for video appointments. No direct visio access is possible from anywhere in the app. Backend returns is_organizer flag and meeting_host_url for organizer in /info and /checkin endpoints. Test file test_organizer_proof_bypass.py created for regression testing.
